data.title: Billionaire predicts stablecoins to dominate global payments in a decade. They are faster, cheaper than fiat.
data.description: According to Stanley Druckenmiller, stablecoins are deemed to be more efficient, quicker, and cost-effective compared to fiat currencies that operate on conventional banking systems.

data.title: CarMax Investigation Initiated: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates the Officers and Directors of CarMax, Inc. - KMX
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, disclosed the initiation of an inquiry by KSF into CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX). This investigation by the firm is significant as it focuses on examining potential issues involving CarMax. This development underscores the attention being given to the company's operations and financial matters.

data.title: Bitcoin approaches $74,000, indicating ongoing bear market as tech stocks' correlation remains a factor.
data.description: Despite its strong performance during the week, Bitcoin continues to show a strong correlation with tech stocks and reacts to spot ETF flows. This indicates that the bear market may not be completely over. The cryptocurrency saw notable fluctuations, with BTC reaching a high of $65,000 before dropping to $60,000. Investors remain cautious as Bitcoin's price movements remain intertwined with broader market trends.

data.title: 1 in 14 Food Service Workers Was Unemployed Last Month - OysterLink
data.description: According to recent data from the Bureau of Labor Statistics, the unemployment rate in the food service industry was 7.1% in February 2026, which is almost double the national average. This means that approximately 1 out of every 14 food service workers was unemployed during that time. The statistics were revealed in a report released on March 13, 2026 in Austin, Texas.

data.title: Marriott International Signs Agreement to Bring St. Regis Hotels & Resorts to Kapalua Bay, Hawai'i
data.description: Occupying 25 acres along the ocean, The Resort at Kapalua Bay is located on a highly esteemed coastline of Maui. Significant figures reveal that Marriott will begin managing The Resort at Kapalua Bay starting March 14, 2026, under the existing ownership. This development sees the property becoming a part of a larger entity.

data.title: René Redzepi's impact on the restaurant world sparks discussions among chefs on changing kitchen dynamics.
data.description: Within the culinary realm, there is ongoing discussion among chefs regarding the extent and methods through which restaurant kitchens can evolve, particularly in light of René Redzepi's influence. These industry experts are deliberating on the potential transformations that can be made, with a focus on innovative approaches.

data.title: Long-Term Care Affordability Sharply Worsening for Middle-Income New Yorkers, New AARP Report Shows
data.description: Albany, New York - On March 13, 2026, it was reported that there is a critical need for investments in cost-effective home services. Home care and assisted living expenses have risen by almost 50% across the country since 2019. This increase has eradicated ten years' worth of advancements in making long-term care affordable for middle-income older individuals. The surge in costs is concerning and underscores the urgent requirement for affordable care options for the elderly population.

data.title: René Redzepi's downfall sparks debate among chefs on revolutionizing restaurant kitchens. #Noma #RenéRedzepi
data.description: Within the culinary world once led by René Redzepi, other chefs are currently discussing the extent and methods through which restaurant kitchens can evolve.

data.title: Kushner seeks $5B for his firm amid Mideast duties as envoy.
data.description: Jared Kushner, the son-in-law of President Trump, is seeking to secure funding of $5 billion or more from foreign governments and various sources for his private equity company.

data.title: Digital Asset Technologies Announces Settlement Agreement with Former Auditor
data.description: The information provided is not intended for distribution in the United States or through U.S. news wire services.

data.title: Coffee's Clean Revolution? Venturi Bold Brew Challenges Sugar-Loaded Café Drinks With a Cleaner Nitro Cold Brew
data.description: Amid increasing concerns about the components used in common coffee drinks, Venturi Bold Brew asserts that consumers should have access to a more health-conscious alternative. According to reports from Atlanta on March 13, 2026, the U.S. coffee sector is experiencing a significant transformation. Venturi Bold Brew aims to offer a solution with its new product.

data.title: WESTSHORE TERMINALS FILES 2025 DISCLOSURE DOCUMENTS AND ANNOUNCES Q1 2026 DISTRIBUTION
data.description: Vancouver, BC - Today, Westshore Terminals Investment Corporation (TSX: WTE) disclosed its audited consolidated financial statements for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. The documents, including related management's discussion and analysis, have been submitted to Canadian security regulatory authorities. Interested parties can access these records on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca and on the Corporation's official website. Moreover, the Corporation declared a dividend of $0.375 per share, set to be distributed to shareholders recorded on March 31, 2026, on or before April 15, 2026. For further details, the full report is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Quirch Foods leadership transition news reissued with updates.
data.description: A recent report reveals that over 2 million jobs were added to the economy in the last month, surpassing expectations. The unemployment rate fell by 0.5% to 5.8%, the lowest since the start of the pandemic. Additionally, the average hourly earnings increased by 0.3%. This positive trend is attributed to various sectors reopening and increased consumer spending. The job market is showing signs of recovery as the economy slowly bounces back from the impact of the pandemic.

data.title: Mountain Commerce Bancorp, Inc. Shareholders Approve Merger with Home Bancshares, Inc.
data.description: In Knoxville, Tennessee on March 13, 2026, Mountain Commerce Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of Mountain Commerce Bank, disclosed that its shareholders approved the merger plan with Home. The Company trades under the symbol OTCQX: MCBI and the Bank has been a part of the industry for 100 years. The approval marks a significant step forward in the merger process.

data.title: AI Play Sandisk Leads 20 Newcomers To Top Growth Stock Lists Like IBD 50, Big Cap 20
data.description: Today, 20 new growth stocks, such as Sandisk in the AI sector, have been added to top stock lists including IBD 50, IBD Big Cap 20, and Stock Spotlight. Sandisk is leading the newcomers in these lists. The post highlights the recent addition of these stocks and their potential for growth and success in the market.

data.title: Court rejects Custodia Bank's plea for a master account, crucial for day-to-day ops, labeling denial as a fatal blow. #legalnews
data.description: According to a recent court ruling, a judge ruled in favor of Custodia Bank, emphasizing the critical importance of a master account for a bank's regular functions. The judge expressed that not having access to a master account is comparable to a severe consequence, with essential daily operations being hindered.

data.title: Chemical odor disrupts air traffic at Washington, Baltimore, and Richmond airports. Ground delays until midnight. Air traffic controllers affected.
data.description: There were ground delays impacting the airport in Richmond, Virginia, anticipated to persist until midnight. The Federal Aviation Administration (F.A.A.) revealed that the delays were due to issues with air traffic controllers caused by a smell, affecting their operations.

data.title: Spanish Broadcasting System, Inc. Enters into Forbearance Agreement with Majority Bondholders Following Notes Maturity
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Spanish Broadcasting System, Inc. issued a statement about its 9.750% Senior Secured Notes that came due on March 1, 2026. The company has been in positive discussions with holders regarding the maturation of the Notes.

data.title: NEDHSA Announces Virtual Opioid Education Series Addressing Maternal Health and Addiction
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Monroe, La., Northeast Delta Human Services Authority (NEDHSA) announced the upcoming launch of its third Opioid Education Series scheduled for March 18. The virtual webinar aims to bring together healthcare professionals, public health leaders, and community stakeholders to address the pressing issue of opioid abuse. This initiative will provide a platform for discussion and collaboration to combat the opioid crisis.
US Energy Department: Energy Department initiates SPR emergency exchange to stabilize global oil supply.
